_comment: Per-million-token USD prices used to derive cost from measured tokens (see docs/BENCHMARKING.md 4.2). All USD is imputed from tokens, not an invoice. Local/open models are priced at a reference hosted rate and clearly labelled 'imputed' in results. Sizes are parsed from the ollama tag or imputed from the catalog's min VRAM. Update 'as_of' when prices change.

gpt-5.5.source: frontier hosted reference rate (estimate; not in local catalog)
